title: The Sculk Horde - Modpack
description:
Modpack version of the mod Sculk Horde
Credits to the creator of the Sculk Horde mod
The creators of the mod have no association with the creator of this modpack
body:
# **The Horde of Souls and Sculk**
The horde makes its way across the world eating the lush ground assilimating it into its mass. Villages are turned to rubble, villagers become raging sculk mutations. The horde shall continue until all mass of the world is consumed.
## **A Hero?**
Who shall stop this horde consuming our World and friends and even foes, could it be possibly maybe just, you?
### **Credits**
[Sculk Horde](https://modrinth.com/mod/sculk-horde)
